name: AIMailer - Weekly AI Tooling Roundup
summary: Agentic weekly email that summarizes ~12 recent articles about AI tools, agentic systems, and model releases for an AI developer.
goals: Deliver a weekly curated email of ~12 relevant AI tooling/model updates
Automate fetch → dedupe → summarize → rank → email pipeline
Prioritise high-signal official releases and dev-focused tooling updates
primary_features: Readability-style extraction and LLM summarization (2–3 sentences + why devs care)
Deduping, scoring and selection of top ~12 items
HTML email composition and scheduled sending via SMTP or API
security_considerations: Keep API keys and SMTP credentials in environment variables, not in repo
Sanitise extracted HTML before summarization to avoid script injection
Rate-limit external requests and handle PIIs carefully
Respect source terms of service and robots.txt where applicable

development_state.notes: Local search endpoints (Perplexica, SEARXNG) available. HTML email sample present in BRIEF.md. Todo list created.

phases.name: Design & Config
phases.description: Define sources, keywords, schedule, required env and initial skeleton

tasks.name: Define required env vars and placeholders

phases.name: Fetch & Extract
phases.description: Implement RSS/API/Perplexica/SEARXNG fetchers and content extraction

phases.name: Summarize & Rank
phases.description: LLM summarization, tagging, dedupe and ranking logic

phases.name: Compose & Send
phases.description: Compose HTML email and implement sending/scheduling

todo.title: Extract article text & summarize with LLM (2–3 sentences + why devs care)
Dedupe, tag, score and select top ~12
Compose HTML email template and test rendering
Send email via SMTP/Outlook/Gmail and schedule with cron
Add logging, monitoring, unsubscribe handling, and docs

open_questions: Which LLM provider should be used (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/local)?
Which email delivery method should be used (SMTP/Gmail API/Outlook)?
Do you want the pipeline implemented as a script or an n8n workflow?

how_to_run_locally.setup: create a virtualenv, install dependencies from requirements.txt
how_to_run_locally.example: export OPENAI_API_KEY=... && export SMTP_HOST=... && python run.py --config config.yaml
how_to_run_locally.notes: Env vars should be used for secrets; config file holds sources and schedule

current_capabilities: HTML email sample present in BRIEF.md
next_steps: Confirm LLM provider and email delivery method
Create config file and skeleton fetcher module
Implement extraction and LLM summarizer and test on sample articles

architecture.overview: Fetcher -> Extractor -> Summarizer -> Dedupe/Rank -> Composer -> Sender

summarizer.description: Call LLM to summarise and tag items

sender.description: Send email via SMTP or provider API

infrastructure.notes: Script scheduled weekly; can be containerised for portability

concept: Automated weekly AI tooling roundup targeted at AI developers

key_files.BRIEF.md: Project brief and sample email content
key_files.SOURCES.md: List of sources and pipeline ideas
